mapper.select: SELECT shelter_id, user_id, name, address, contact_info FROM shelter
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shelterapplication WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = '待审核'

SELECT shelter_id, user_id, name, address, contact_info FROM shelter WHERE (#{shelterName} IS NULL OR name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{shelterName}, '%')) AND (#{address} IS NULL OR address LIKE CONCAT('%', #{address}, '%'))
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO shelter (user_id, name, address, contact_info) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{address}, #{contactInfo});
